title: Smoky Light Adventurous Squid Wrap
description: A light, smoky, and adventurous Mexican dish featuring squid and a unique leaf wrap and steam cooking method. Serve immediately to enjoy the flavors and textures.

ingredients.name: canned chipotle peppers in adobo sauce

instructions: Soak 4-6 corn tortillas in water for 30 seconds.
Cut the squid into thin strips and season with salt and pepper.
Heat 1/4 cup of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the squid for 2 minutes on each side, then set aside.
In the same skillet, add the red onion and cook for 3 minutes until softened.
Add the chipotle peppers and cook for an additional minute.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by placing a portion of the squid and onion mixture onto a tortilla, followed by a sprinkle of cilantro and a squeeze of lime juice.
